evals.prompt: /m_plan Fix the off-by-one in the pagination helper in src/utils/paginate.ts.
evals.expected_output: Classifies the task as tiny, writes only artifacts 01/04/05/09, asks at most one blocker batch (including size confirmation), then executes and decides done from 09.
assertions: Writes only the tiny artifact set (01, 04, 05, 09); does not write 02/03/06/07/08.
Asks blocker + size-confirmation questions in a single batch (or one numbered list when AskUserQuestion is unavailable).
Decides 'done' from 09_verification.md, not from its own judgement.

evals.prompt: /m_plan Add a billing webhook endpoint that writes to a new table and deploys to our staging VPS.
evals.expected_output: Classifies as large, writes all 9 artifacts, asks blockers covering environment/secrets/migration/deploy, and treats deploy and smoke as real-target gates.
assertions: Pre-classifies as large and writes all 9 artifacts.
Blocker questions cover environment, secrets, migration, and deploy approval.
08_e2e_plan.md is written because a new externally-callable endpoint is added.
09 lists V-DEPLOY / V-SMOKE rows tied to the real target, not localhost.
Build/test commands live only in 07 and are referenced elsewhere, not duplicated.

evals.prompt: /m_plan Add a --json flag to the export CLI command.
evals.expected_output: Plans (small/medium), walks the step plan, flips V-STEP rows as per-step checks pass, logs deviations immediately into 09, and reports from 09.
assertions: Walks 05 step-by-step and flips V-STEP-Sxx via edits as per-step checks pass.
Logs deviations under ## Deviations in 09 as they happen, not reconstructed at the end.
Runs a final V-* sweep before declaring done.
Does not edit 01-08 to shrink scope and does not delete V-* rows.
